news_items.headline: Brewers' Misiorowski hurls 105.5 mph pitch in win
news_items.summary: Brewers starter Jacob Misiorowski threw a first-inning fastball that was clocked at 105.5 mph, breaking his own record for the fastest pitch recorded by a starting pitcher in the pitch tracking era (since 2008).

news_items.headline: Angels fire GM Minasian; tab Mozeliak for revamp
news_items.summary: The Angels have fired general manager Perry Minasian and are bringing in longtime executive John Mozeliak as a consultant to the baseball operations department.

news_items.headline: Lindor says Mets players 'failed' ousted Mendoza
news_items.summary: Shortstop Francisco Lindor and president of baseball operations David Stearns were among prominent members of the Mets who assumed responsibility for the team's dismal start that led to manager Carlos Mendoza's firing.

news_items.headline: Trout unlikely for Home Run Derby due to injury
news_items.summary: Mike Trout says he is unlikely to participate in the Home Run Derby in Philadelphia because of his strained right hamstring.

news_items.headline: White Sox rout K.C. 22-1, their most runs since '7...
news_items.summary: Tristan Peters hit a grand slam and had six RBIs, Miguel Vargas had a three-run homer and an RBI double in Chicago's 10-run third inning, and the White Sox routed the Royals 22-1.

news_items.headline: Red Sox place Mayer on IL with forearm injury
news_items.summary: The Red Sox have placed infielder Marcelo Mayer on the 10-day injured list because of a left forearm injury.
